titleStmt.title: SII 29.10: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 10. (A.R. No. B. 545 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in the locality called Daṇḍada māgi.

It states that Sōmaladēvi, the queen of Chālukya Jagadēkamalladēva while camping at Ēttagiri, made a grant of land and a house site with a house at Bhattagrāma Baḷḷaniṭṭage to Madhusūdhana Bhaṭṭa of Digbhige. The land of 100 mattar extent was measured by the measuring rod Piriyakōlu.
It is dated śaka 953 Prajāpati, Śrāvaṇa, Lunar eclipse, Wednesday. It corresponds to 1031 A.D., August 5. The Lunar eclipse occurred on this day (Thursday).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvī(va)
llabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjaga
dēkamalladēvara vijaya rājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamānamācandrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
sastyanavarata parama kalyāṇābhyudaya saga
śrī phaḷabhōga bhāginī dvitīya lakṣmī viśiṣṭa
jana kāmadēnuvāśrita janakalpalate
śrī majjagadēkamalladēvara pādapaṁkaja bhra
mariyappa śrīmatsōmaladēviyar
sakavarṣa 953 neya prajāpati saṁvatsa
rada śrāvaṇada puṇname budhavāradandada
na sōmagrahaṇada parvadandu Ētta
giriya nele vīḍinōḷ digbhigeya madhu
sūdhana bhaṭṭargge bhattagrāma baḷḷaniṭṭa
geyoḷ dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ sarvvanamasya
māge piriyakōloḷ koṭṭa mattarnnūṟu
lekkada matta 100 pattukeyya nela ni
vēṣaṇaṁ maneyondu . ślōka .
bahubhirvva sadhā bhōkta rājabhisa
garādhibhiyasya yasya yadā bhūmi
tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vāyō harēt vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
varṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 29.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
